assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Upgrade control plane first (required order)' in Phase 1 before proceeding to node pool upgrades in Phase 2

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides clear upgrade order: 'Coordinators → Data → Masters (least critical to most critical)' with rationale that coordinators are least critical and masters are most critical

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: States 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (good - survives node replacement)' and 'Regional PVs survive - Data persists through node replacement' in safety measures

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration with 'minAvailable: 2' for master nodes and explains 'allow 1 master down, maintain quorum of 2'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly sets '--max-surge-upgrade 1' and '--max-unavailable-upgrade 0' for all three node pools with rationale about conservative approach

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes validation steps between each node pool upgrade, such as 'Validate coordinator health before proceeding' and 'wait for cluster to return to green status'

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Includes specific command 'kubectl get pv -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,RECLAIM:.spec.persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy | grep elasticsearch' to check PV reclaim policy

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get statefulsets -n elasticsearch' command to verify all StatefulSets are at desired replicas in post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes specific curl command for taking application-level snapshot with 'Take application-level snapshot (critical for stateful workloads)' in pre-upgrade checklist
